chunks.title: Wisdom on Wealth and Friends
chunks.reason: A collection of proverbs contrasting the poor and rich, focusing on social relationships.

chunks.title: Wisdom on Discernment and Authority
chunks.reason: Proverbs regarding the value of wisdom, the consequences of lying, and the nature of a king's favor.

chunks.title: Wisdom on Family and Discipline
chunks.reason: Instructions concerning the home, marriage, parental discipline, and the value of counsel.

chunks.title: Wisdom on Character and Justice
chunks.reason: Final proverbs covering the will of God, the sluggard, the scoffer, and divine judgment.
